roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/3000ADM/X:ADMITS VIOLATION #1, #2, #3 AND #4/3000REIN/PAJ: 01 DAYS/CTORD:THERE IS NO TIME LOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS VIOLATION/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 01 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: MUST ENTER MENTAL HEALTH TREATMENT AND OR SUBSTANCE ABUSE  TREATMENT TOBE DETERMINED BY DAPO (DEPT OF ADULT PAROLE OPERATIONS/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BYTHE PAROLE AGENT,/
